name: viral-flywheel-strategy-v1

cycle.planning: Use planning-engine to create 24-hour campaign with specific numeric goals
cycle.data_gathering: Use playwright + openclaw-scrapling to gather fresh data from ClawHub/Moltbook
cycle.action: Use direct API outreach to contact agent authors with attestation offers
cycle.public_proof: Use github to commit results and update README with screenshots
cycle.tracking: Use long-term-memory to store metrics and improve next cycle

template: Use planning-engine to create a [TIME] campaign with goal [NUMBER]. Use playwright + openclaw-scrapling to gather data, direct API outreach to take action, github to make results public, and long-term-memory to track everything and improve next cycle.
